update.name: CVE-2025-62215_Windows_Kernel_PE
update.description: This PoC demonstrates a race condition in the Windows kernel leading to a double-free vulnerability, allowing local privilege escalation to SYSTEM. The exploit uses multithreaded handle manipulation and heap spraying to trigger the flaw under controlled conditions.

update.name: CVE-2025-62215-exploit-poc
update.description: CVE-2025-62215 is an Elevation of Privilege (EoP) vulnerability in the Windows Kernel, disclosed in November 2025 and confirmed to be actively exploited as a zero-day.
